events.name: MST
events.syllabus:
Website Embedded AI Chabot  TaskWave – NeuraNext AI Automation Website with Embedded AI Chatbot  NeuraNext   is a modern AI automation platform that helps businesses scale through intelligent systems and smart workflow solutions. The website features a fully integrated AI chatbot that provides real-time, interactive support to visitors.  It showcases AI agents, workflow automation, and seamless integrations designed to reduce costs, automate tasks, and improve business efficiency — serving as both a service platform and a live demonstration of AI-powered automation.  AI Agent  TaskWave   is an AI automation website featuring a real-time AI chatbot built using   n8n workflow automation   and the   Google Gemini Chat Model .  The chatbot is triggered via a webhook in n8n, processes conversations through a custom AI Agent with defined system instructions, maintains short-term memory for context, and generates intelligent responses using Gemini.
It is designed to greet visitors, understand business needs, suggest AI automation solutions, collect lead details, and encourage demo bookings — showcasing a practical implementation of AI-powered business automation.  Website Embedded AI Chabot  ChatBot Demo :
